videos.title: Mono-Blue Towns | $20 Budget Magic
videos.description:
Can PuPu UFO, Travel the Overworld, and a bunch of Towns keep up in Standard on just a $20 budget? Let's find out!

Today's video is brought to you by Card Kingdom. You can pick up some Magic: the Gathering cards (and help support the show) at https://www.cardkingdom.com/mtggoldfish

► Read more about this deck (full article): https://www.mtggoldfish.com/articles/budget-magic-20-mono-blue-towns-standard
► View this deck with the latest prices: https://www.mtggoldfish.com/deck/7307263#paper

◼ Purchase this deck (paper): http://mtg.fish/nAKac
◼ Purchase this deck (Magic Online): http://mtg.fish/dZmSv
